_comment_top: Example retention config for VCF 9.x. In VCF 9 the backup configuration is split between 'Operations -> Administration -> SDDC Manager -> Backups' (SDDC Manager + NSX) and 'Fleet Management -> Lifecycle -> Settings -> SFTP/Backup' (Fleet Manager, VCF Identity Broker, VCF Automation). Adjust paths to match the SFTP directories you configured in each place.

backup_targets._comment: SDDC Manager backup, same format as VCF 5.x: vcf-backup-<host>-<domain>-<timestamp>.tar.gz plus .sha256 sidecar. Both extensions are managed together.
backup_targets.name: VCF 9 - SDDC Manager

backup_targets._comment: NSX cluster/node backups, same layout as VCF 5.x: backup-<YYYY-MM-DDTHH_MM_SS>UTC/ under each node UUID. Per-node retention.
backup_targets.name: VCF 9 - NSX cluster/node backups

backup_targets._comment: vCenter Server file-based backup (VAMI). Two-level structure: <root>/sn_<fqdn>/M_<version>_<YYYYMMDD>-<HHMMSS>_/.
backup_targets.name: VCF 9 - vCenter Server (VAMI)

backup_targets._comment: VCF 9 Fleet Management backups - covers Fleet Manager, VCF Identity Broker (VIDB), and VCF Automation (VCFA). Layout per Broadcom docs: vcf/backups/<cluster-name>/<version>/<component-name>/<timestamp>/<file>.tgz. Retention is applied PER component automatically.
backup_targets.name: VCF 9 - Fleet Management (Fleet Manager / Identity Broker / Automation)
